prestazioni: Full bolt-on S58B30T0 (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) Stage 2+ ECU flash by MHD with custom 22 psi map, ported throttle body, and upgraded high-flow fuel injectors (Bosch 0261500405) for 650+ WHP on E85 blend, paired with a CSF Racing S58-specific intercooler (core volume: 2.8L) and upgraded charge pipes (VRSF 3.5" aluminum)

Hybrid turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (62mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Turbosmart Comp-Gate 40 wastegate and custom downpipe (3.5" catted, GESI G-Sport catalytic converter, 200-cell)

Drivetrain reinforcement: M2-specific OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way, 85% lockup), Sachs Performance Stage 3 clutch (300Nm torque capacity), and a G87-specific Driveshaft Shop 1-piece aluminum driveshaft (750HP-rated) with upgraded CV joints (GKN Lobro X-treme)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS G87 M2 widebody kit (front fenders: +50mm, rear fenders: +70mm) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Vorsteiner G8X M2-specific front splitter (3D-molded, 3-piece) and rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 50mm extension)

Custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system (4.5" tips, quad-exit, S58-specific valvetronic bypass) with integrated carbon fiber heat shields and a custom X-pipe (3.5" diameter, Inconel 625 material) for aggressive 3,500-4,500 RPM crackle tune

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber mirror caps (painted in Frozen Portimao Blue), custom G87-specific carbon fiber hood (RK Carbon, 30% weight reduction, functional heat extractor vents) with M Performance carbon fiber kidney grilles (gloss black, laser-cut mesh)
